message:
Improve FrankenEye with clipPath blink and centered iris positioning

Blink animation rewrite:
  Replaced scaleY-based eyelid closing (which squished the eyelid
  div unnaturally) with clipPath inset animations. The top lid
  animates clipPath from "inset(0 0 100% 0)" to "inset(0 0 0% 0)"
  and the bottom lid does the inverse, creating an organic closing
  motion that looks like actual eyelids meeting in the middle.
  Duration tightened from 100ms to 120ms with easeInOut for a more
  natural blink cadence.

Iris centering fix:
  The iris+pupil group was positioned relative to its parent without
  explicit centering, causing it to drift depending on container
  padding. Now wrapped in an absolute inset-0 flex container with
  items-center justify-center, ensuring the iris always sits at the
  geometric center of the eyeball regardless of layout context.

Visual refinements:
  - Blood vessel SVG paths extended further from center (15,15 vs
    20,20) with thicker strokes (0.8 vs 0.5) for visibility
  - Iris gets inset box-shadow for depth
  - Spring stiffness increased (200 vs 150) for snappier tracking
  - Pupil hover dilation slightly reduced (1.3x vs 1.4x)
  - Surface shadow deepened (12px spread, 0.4 opacity) for realism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
